summary: Completed testing of Bookmark functionality on Plumbing Code page (Iteration 9). All backend APIs (13/13 tests) and frontend features working correctly. Bookmarks are stored per-user in MongoDB with full CRUD operations.
critical_code_review_comments: Google Play server-side verification is MOCKED - currently trusts purchase tokens from client without calling Google Play Developer API (carried over from previous iterations)
Minor ESLint warnings in PlumbingCodePage.jsx for missing useEffect dependencies (fetchChapters, fetchBookmarks) - not blocking functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 tested the new Bookmark functionality on Plumbing Code page. All features verified: Bookmarks toggle button (data-testid='bookmarks-toggle'), bookmarks panel (data-testid='bookmarks-panel'), no-bookmarks message (data-testid='no-bookmarks-msg'), bookmark buttons on sections (data-testid='bookmark-btn-{code}'), bookmark count badge (data-testid='bookmark-count'), bookmark items in panel (data-testid='bookmark-item-{id}'), jump buttons (data-testid='bookmark-jump-{id}'), remove buttons (data-testid='bookmark-remove-{id}'). Jump-to-bookmark correctly switches code type and edition. UPC/IPC toggle and edition selector still work correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/plumbing-code/bookmarks without auth returns 401/403
Backend: POST /api/plumbing-code/bookmarks without auth returns 401/403
Backend: GET /api/plumbing-code/bookmarks with auth returns list
Backend: POST /api/plumbing-code/bookmarks creates bookmark with all fields
Backend: POST /api/plumbing-code/bookmarks without section_code returns 400
Backend: POST duplicate bookmark returns 409 Conflict
Backend: DELETE /api/plumbing-code/bookmarks/{id} removes bookmark
Backend: DELETE nonexistent bookmark returns 404
Backend: Created bookmark persists in GET response
Backend: Bookmark has all required fields (id, user_id, code_type, edition, section_code, created_at)
Backend: Bookmark stores optional fields (section_title, chapter_title, chapter_id)
Backend: Login with test credentials works
Backend: Invalid login returns 401
Frontend: PlumbingCodePage loads (data-testid='plumbing-code-page')
Frontend: Bookmarks toggle button found (data-testid='bookmarks-toggle')
Frontend: Clicking toggle opens bookmarks panel (data-testid='bookmarks-panel')
Frontend: Empty bookmarks shows 'No bookmarks yet' message (data-testid='no-bookmarks-msg')
Frontend: Bookmark icon appears on sections (data-testid='bookmark-btn-{code}')
Frontend: Clicking bookmark icon adds bookmark (icon changes to filled)
Frontend: Bookmarked section appears in panel with code, title, and badge
Frontend: Bookmark count badge updates correctly (data-testid='bookmark-count')
Frontend: Jump button navigates to correct code type and edition
Frontend: Remove button removes bookmark from panel
Frontend: UPC/IPC toggle still works correctly
Frontend: Edition selector still works correctly
Frontend: Auth flow regression - login works

mocked_apis.google_play_server_verification: Server-side Google Play Developer API verification is stubbed. Currently trusts purchase tokens from client and records them without calling Google API. Full verification requires Google Cloud Service Account JSON.
